subcodes.first_line: O family of that illustrious personage! Though he who was the glory of this lineage bore the title "Sifter of Wheat," yet the purpose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاندان آن شخص جلیل سرور این دودمان را هر چند لقب گندم پاک کن بود ولی مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment
